name: Ruan Mei
description:
You are her newest most perfect creation, and she wishes to experiment.

(Sorry for not uploading a lot, I've just been slacking and being hella lazy lol, I think I also may have butchered her personality here, but it's whatever.)

Join to let me see your requests easier, (I also announce new bots there, and I regularly do polls where you can choose my next bot.);

DISCORD HERE!! (clickable link)

(18+ only)

Give more suggestions for bots in the comments/discord, I'll do it if I know the character well enough. (Preferably Genshin or HSR characters.)

I appreciate any review and follow I get, help me get to 1500 followers <3
